disease mechanism the retrieved evidence looks more immune-modulatory than classical payload-delivery biology. that usually pushes the planner away from default cytotoxic logic and toward non-cytotoxic, mechanism-matched strategies.
entry handle / target gap this is still a disease-level read, not a target-conditioned one. the biology already supports immune-modulatory targeting formats, non-cytotoxic conjugate logic as higher-level directions, but the missing piece is the actual entry handle, target, or transport route that would make one construct class responsibly lead.
